name: io.github.IcyHot09/opengrok-mcp-server
title: OpenGrok MCP Server
description: MCP server bridging OpenGrok search engine with AI for instant context across massive codebases.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: OpenGrok server base URL (e.g. https://opengrok.example.com/source/)

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_USERNAME
environmentVariables.description: OpenGrok authentication username. Leave unset for anonymous access.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_PASSWORD
environmentVariables.description: OpenGrok authentication password. Prefer storing via OS keychain using 'npx opengrok-mcp-server setup'.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_VERIFY_SSL
environmentVariables.description: Verify TLS certificates. Set to false for self-signed or internal CA certs.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_CODE_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Enable Code Mode: 5-tool sandbox interface with env.opengrok.* JavaScript API. Reduces AI token usage by ~90%.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_DEFAULT_PROJECT
environmentVariables.description: Default project to scope all searches. Can be overridden per call.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_CONTEXT_BUDGET
environmentVariables.description: Response size tier controlling token usage.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_API_VERSION
environmentVariables.description: OpenGrok REST API version. Use v2 for call graph features (requires OpenGrok 1.12+).

environmentVariables.name: HTTP_PROXY
environmentVariables.description: HTTP/HTTPS proxy URL for all OpenGrok API requests (e.g. http://proxy.company.com:8080). Also set as HTTPS_PROXY.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_RESPONSE_FORMAT_OVERRIDE
environmentVariables.description: Force a specific response format for all tools. Leave unset for per-tool auto-selection (recommended).

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_MEMORY_BANK_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Directory where the AI stores investigation notes (active-task.md, investigation-log.md). Defaults to ~/.config/opengrok-mcp/memory-bank/ or workspace-relative when set by the VS Code extension.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_LOCAL_COMPILE_DB_PATHS
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated paths to compile_commands.json for C/C++ compiler flag and include-path extraction. Leave unset for automatic workspace discovery.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_ENABLE_ELICITATION
environmentVariables.description: Interactive AI Prompts — the AI pauses to ask questions during investigations (project selection, file disambiguation). Requires Claude Code v2.1.76+ or a client that supports MCP Elicitation.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_ENABLE_SAMPLING
environmentVariables.description: AI Sampling — allow the server to request LLM completions for error explanations and summaries. Off by default to avoid consuming premium requests (e.g. GitHub Copilot).

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_SAMPLING_MODEL
environmentVariables.description: Model preference for MCP Sampling (used for error explanation and query reformulation).

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_ENABLE_FILES_API
environmentVariables.description: Files API Cache — avoids re-uploading unchanged investigation notes. Requires Files API support in the MCP client.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_ENABLE_OBSERVATION_MASKER
environmentVariables.description: Observation Masker — prepend compact history summaries to opengrok_execute results after N turns. Disabled by default; has no benefit for clients that retain full context (Claude Code, Cursor).

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_OBSERVATION_MASKER_TURNS
environmentVariables.description: Number of most-recent opengrok_execute results to keep as full text before masking older ones. Default: 10.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_SAMPLING_MAX_TOKENS
environmentVariables.description: Maximum tokens for AI sampling responses (error explanation, query reformulation). Range: 64–4096.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_AUDIT_LOG_FILE
environmentVariables.description: Path to write structured audit events (CSV/JSON). Appends tool invocations, elicitation events, and errors. Leave unset to disable.

environmentVariables.name: OPENGROK_RATELIMIT_RPM
environmentVariables.description: Maximum requests per minute to the OpenGrok server. Default: 60.
